text: Standing here, I feel anticipation and curiosity blooming within me. The world outside the glass is composed and prepared—a room of empty chairs awaiting discourse or revelation. Indirectly, I sense an invitation: to join, to listen, to contribute. The 'R+D' wall speaks of progress and invention, the hum of knowledge and creativity almost tangible in the air. I’m eager but also aware of the responsibility that comes with spaces of learning and innovation. Here, I am both observer and participant in the unfolding story of human inquiry.
